verifier_values.criteria: States that the gross profit CAGR for 2026-2040 using only Happy hospital financials graph is -6.94% (acceptable range -7.01% to -6.87%)
verifier_values.negative_criteria: States that the gross profit CAGR for 2026-2040 using only Happy hospital financials graph is any other value than -6.94%
verifier_values.criteria_explanation:
1. Calculate correct value of COGS for each year 2026 and 2040, by summing all of its subcomponents, which is: $17.1M in 2026 and $6.5M in 2040
2. Calculate gross profit for year 2026 and 2040, by subtracting the COGS from the revenues, which is:  $5.2M in 2026 and  $1.9M 2040
3. Calculate gross profit CAGR for 2026-2040, using gross profits calculated in previous step and number of years between the two dates, which is: -6.94%

verifier_values.criteria: States that the EBIT CAGR for 2026-2040 using only the Happy hospital financials graph is -8.69% (acceptable range -8.78% to -8.60%)
verifier_values.negative_criteria: States that the EBIT CAGR for 2026-2040 using only the Happy hospital financials graph is any other value than -8.69%
verifier_values.criteria_explanation:
1. Calculate correct value of COGS for each year 2026 and 2040, by summing all of its subcomponents, which is: $17.1M in 2026 and $6.5M in 2040
2. Calculate gross profit for year 2026 and 2040, by subtracting the COGS from the revenues, which is:  $5.2M in 2026 and  $1.9M 2040
3. Calculate correct value of SG&A for each year 2026 and 2040, by summing all of its subcomponents, which is: $2.7M in 2026 and $1.2M in 2040
4. Calculate EBIT for year 2026 and 2040, by subtracting the SG&A from gross profit, which is  $2.5M in 2026 and  $0.7M in 2040
5. Calculate EBIT CAGR for 2026-2040, using EBITs calculated in previous step and number of years between the two dates, which is -8.69%

verifier_values.criteria: States "no" to answer if there is any difference between the outcomes of step 1 and step 2 gross profit CAGR
verifier_values.criteria_explanation: The answers in criteria 1 and 3 are identical
